meta.title: TabStyr — Private browser time tracking
meta.description: See where your browser time really goes — active time per site, trends, heatmaps, focus, and stale-tab nudges. 100% local. 0 bytes leave your device.
meta.ogDescription: Active time per site, trends, heatmaps, focus. 100% local — nothing leaves your device.
meta.privacyDescription: TabStyr collects nothing. No servers, no analytics, no accounts, no network requests. Everything stays on your device.
meta.ideasDescription: Suggest a feature or report a bug for TabStyr. No account, no tracking — it goes straight to the maker.

hero.lede: TabStyr quietly measures active time per tab and site, then turns it into a calm dashboard — trends, an activity heatmap, focus scoring, and gentle stale-tab nudges. Every byte stays on your device.
hero.micro: No account · no servers · no tracking · MIT licensed
hero.previewAlt: TabStyr dashboard showing today's active time, category breakdown, trends and an activity heatmap

features.titleLead: Everything you need to understand your time —

items.title: Active-time tracking
items.body: Per tab and per site, second by second. Background audio is counted separately, so totals never exceed real time at the screen.

items.title: Trends & comparison
items.body: Day / week / month activity trends, plus this-week-vs-last-week by category.

items.title: Focus score
items.body: Productive ÷ distracting, a daily streak, and a focus trend over time.

items.title: Activity heatmap
items.body: Which hours of which days you actually browse — at a glance.

items.title: Auto-categorized
items.body: Work, Dev, Social, Media and more — recognized automatically. Re-classify any site with one click.

items.title: Encrypted backups
items.body: Export your full history as JSON, optionally passphrase-encrypted (AES-256-GCM). Restore on any device.

showcase.title: A quiet, premium view of your day
showcase.sub: Open the toolbar popup for an instant read; jump to the full dashboard for the detail. Both themes, designed to be glanced at — not studied.
showcase.popupAlt: TabStyr {theme} popup with today's total and top sites
showcase.copyBody: The popup gives you an instant read on today — then gets out of the way.
bullets: Live "active today" total vs your weekly average
Stale-tab reminder, at most once a day
Light and dark, following your system or your choice

privacyBand.eyebrow: Privacy, not as a feature — as the foundation
privacyBand.lede: Your data lives in your browser's own database (IndexedDB), pruned to a rolling 90-day window. You can export it, restore it, or wipe it — any time, all offline.

points.v: Nothing is uploaded. There is no backend to send data to.
Install and go. No sign-up, no email, no profile.
No analytics, no ads, no third-party scripts.
Only tab metadata (URL/title) from standard browser APIs.

items.q: Is my browsing data really private?
items.a: Yes. TabStyr makes zero network requests — its content-security policy even blocks them. Everything is stored locally in your browser and pruned after 90 days. You can export or wipe it anytime.

Active foreground time per site — the tab you are actually looking at — plus background audio counted separately. It never reads page contents, only the URL/title the browser already exposes to extensions.

items.q: Does it slow down my browser?
items.a: No. It is event-driven with a once-a-minute checkpoint, uses an efficient local database, and ships ~130 KB of gzipped JavaScript. No background polling, no remote calls.
Chrome, Edge, Brave, Opera, Arc and other Chromium browsers fully. Firefox 115+ is supported (favicons show as letter chips). Safari works after an Xcode conversion.
Free to use and MIT-licensed. No ads, no account, no paid wall on the core experience.

items.q: Can I move my data to another device?
items.a: Yes — export a full backup (JSON, optionally passphrase-encrypted with AES-256-GCM) and restore it anywhere.

feedback.title: Built in the open — with you.
feedback.sub: No tracking, no feedback widgets phoning home. Just a simple form — no account, no sign-in, and nothing stored about you.
feedback.ideaTitle: Share an idea or report a bug
feedback.ideaBody: Want a feature, a new metric, or hit something broken? Tell me right here — no account needed.
feedback.supportBody: TabStyr is free and open source. A small tip keeps it going.

cta.title: Take back your browser time.
cta.sub: Install in two clicks. Your data never leaves the device. Uninstall removes everything.
cta.soonNote: Store listings are on the way — star the repo to hear when they land.

privacyPage.leadStrong: TabStyr does not collect, transmit, or share any data.
privacyPage.leadRest: Everything it records stays on your device. There are no servers, no analytics, no accounts, and no network requests of any kind.
privacyPage.storesTitle: What it stores (locally, in your browser's IndexedDB)

stores.label: Session records
stores.body: start/end times, the page's domain, and whether the tab played audio.

stores.label: Open-tab metadata
stores.body: title, URL, last-active time, and a random local id used to attribute time.

stores.label: Settings
stores.body: stale threshold, idle timeout, theme, audio counting, category rules.

privacyPage.retention: Data is kept for a rolling 90-day window, then pruned automatically.
notItems: Does not send data off your device, or use servers, cloud sync, or analytics.
Does not contain ads or trackers.
Does not read page contents — only tab metadata (URL/title) from standard extension APIs.

perms.why: See the active tab's URL/title to attribute time to the right site.
Save your stats and settings locally.
Pause tracking when you step away so totals stay accurate.
Periodic checkpoints and the once-daily maintenance task.

privacyPage.noHost: No host permissions are requested — the extension cannot access the content of the pages you visit.
controlItems: Export your full history as JSON, optionally passphrase-encrypted (AES-256-GCM).
Restore from a backup on this or another device.
Wipe all data in one click; removing the extension deletes everything.

ideaPage.lead: Feature requests, rough ideas, papercuts — all welcome. It goes straight to the maker. No account, no tracking.
ideaPage.successBody: Your idea is in — it goes straight to the maker. If you left an email, you might hear back.
ideaPage.notConfigured: The idea form isn't connected yet. Paste your Formspree endpoint in landing/src/site.ts (FORMSPREE_ENDPOINT).
ideaPage.emailOpt: (optional — only if you want a reply)
ideaPage.placeholder: I'd love it if TabStyr could…
ideaPage.error: Couldn't send — please try again in a moment.
